title: The Legend of Zelda: Ocarina of Time
reviewer_notes: Good hero read, clear landmark, strong atmosphere. Keep as approved reference for this family.

title: Tony Hawk's Pro Skater 2
decision_reason: clear sports read and usable hero silhouette
reviewer_notes: Good motion, readable trick silhouette, environment supports the subject without clutter.

title: Soul Calibur
reviewer_notes: Needs one duelist only, one blade, and a stage landmark. Current image reads as a spectacle, not a duel.

title: Castlevania: Rondo of Blood
reviewer_notes: Strong silhouette, readable castle destination, good mood and value structure. Safe enough and desirable.

title: Perfect Dark
decision_reason: too noir-generic and not enough sci-fi espionage
reviewer_notes: Corridor is clean but the operative reads like a generic detective/guard. Needs colder sci-fi facility identity.

title: Tetris
decision_reason: too abstract and not enough playfield memory
reviewer_notes: Current image is a cube sculpture. It needs a clear vertical well and one imminent falling piece.

title: Super Mario 64
decision_reason: too geometry-first and not enough course identity
reviewer_notes: Needs rounded toy-like 3D terrain and a landmark route. Current image feels like abstract blocks with a runner.

title: Super Metroid
decision_reason: world is strong but the subject cue is wrong
reviewer_notes: Alien cavern is good, but the handheld weapon reads like a sword. Needs clearer sci-fi explorer tooling.

title: Super Mario Bros. 3
decision_reason: too graphic-flat and weak stage read
reviewer_notes: Needs a stronger side-scrolling stage read with one jump arc. Current stripes flatten the scene too much.

title: Tekken 3
decision_reason: readable silhouette but weak franchise/world signal
reviewer_notes: Current image is cleaner than Soul Calibur but still too abstract. Needs urban or industrial fight-space identity.
